creator: j@pureftpd.org
text:
diff -ur /usr/ports/ftp/pure-ftpd.orig/Makefile /usr/ports/ftp/pure-ftpd/Makefile
--- /usr/ports/ftp/pure-ftpd.orig/Makefile	Sun Jul 15 11:56:21 2001
+++ /usr/ports/ftp/pure-ftpd/Makefile	Fri Jul 20 11:37:35 2001
@@ -6,7 +6,7 @@
 #
 
 PORTNAME=	pure-ftpd
-PORTVERSION=	0.98.7
+PORTVERSION=	0.98.8
 CATEGORIES=	ftp ipv6
 MASTER_SITES=	${MASTER_SITE_SOURCEFORGE}
 MASTER_SITE_SUBDIR=	pureftpd
diff -ur /usr/ports/ftp/pure-ftpd.orig/distinfo /usr/ports/ftp/pure-ftpd/distinfo
--- /usr/ports/ftp/pure-ftpd.orig/distinfo	Sun Jul 15 11:56:21 2001
+++ /usr/ports/ftp/pure-ftpd/distinfo	Fri Jul 20 11:38:18 2001
@@ -1 +1 @@
-MD5 (pure-ftpd-0.98.7.tar.gz) = 381169cc31fdebfa2d414cd264d8485b
+MD5 (pure-ftpd-0.98.8.tar.gz) = 26f2455666304e5ac726e4d20dad0946

Fix: 

This version has no new feature. It's a maintenance release. Bug fixes from
0.99pre2 were backported.
This pr doesn't include an additional contributed patch (LDAP option)
discussed with Peter by private mail.
How-To-Repeat: -
